author: Fallenbagel
description:
Jellyseerr is a self-hosted media request and management tool designed to streamline media library request and discovery processes, offering an intuitive Web interface, ideal for home media server users and small teams. It seamlessly integrates with existing media services, enabling efficient management of movies, shows, and mixed content libraries.

The tool's core features include a customizable request system and broad media server integration. It allows users to request movies or individual show seasons through a user-friendly interface, with administrators able to approve requests via a simple management UI. It integrates with Jellyfin, Emby, and Plex, supporting user import and authentication with existing accounts. Diverse notification channels (e.g., Discord, Telegram, Email) provide real-time request status updates, and library scanning tracks available media to prevent duplicate requests.

It offers a granular permission system, enabling precise control over user access and actions. The mobile-friendly design facilitates on-the-go request approvals, while watchlist and blacklist support help users filter content. Support for PostgreSQL and SQLite databases ensures flexible deployment options. Community support via GitHub and Discord provides documentation and assistance, delivering a modern media management solution with intuitive operation and high flexibility.

**Key Features:**
- Full Jellyfin/Emby/Plex integration including authentication with user import & management.
- Support for PostgreSQL and SQLite databases.
- Supports Movies, Shows and Mixed Libraries.
- Ability to change email addresses for SMTP purposes.
- Easy integration with your existing services. Currently, Jellyseerr supports Sonarr and Radarr.
- Jellyfin/Emby/Plex library scan, to keep track of the titles which are already available.
- Customizable request system, which allows users to request individual seasons or movies in a friendly, easy-to-use interface.
- Incredibly simple request management UI. Don't dig through the app to simply approve recent requests!
- Granular permission system.
- Support for various notification agents.
- Mobile-friendly design, for when you need to approve requests on the go!
- Support for watchlisting & blacklisting media.

**Learn More:**
- [Jellyseerr Documentation](https://docs.jellyseerr.dev/)
- [Jellyseerr GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Fallenbagel/jellyseerr)
tagline: Jellyseerr is a free and open source software application for managing requests for your media library.

releaseNotes.en_US:
- Jellyseerr v2.7.3 fixes API docs and makes the UserSettings username field nullable.
- It updates the Plex Watchlist URL, handles invalid blacklist keywords gracefully, and refreshes media state before MEDIA_AVAILABLE notifications.
- It also fixes 4K media delete handling and initializes image proxies after proxy setup.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- Jellyseerr v2.7.3 fixes API docs and makes the UserSettings username field nullable.
- It updates the Plex Watchlist URL, handles invalid blacklist keywords gracefully, and refreshes media state before MEDIA_AVAILABLE notifications.
- It also fixes 4K media delete handling and initializes image proxies after proxy setup.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- Jellyseerr v2.7.3 corregge i documenti API e rende annullabile il campo nome utente UserSettings.
- Aggiorna la Watchlist Plex URL, gestisce con garbo le parole chiave della lista nera non valide e aggiorna lo stato dei media prima delle notifiche MEDIA_AVAILABLE.
- Corregge inoltre la gestione dell'eliminazione dei supporti 4K e inizializza i proxy delle immagini dopo la configurazione del proxy.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- Jellyseerr v2.7.3 fikser API-dokumenter og gjør feltet UserSettings brukernavn nullbart.
- Den oppdaterer Plex-overvåkningslisten URL, håndterer ugyldige svartelistenøkkelord på en elegant måte, og oppdaterer mediestatus før MEDIA_AVAILABLE-varsler.
- Den fikser også 4K medieslettingshåndtering og initialiserer bildeproxyer etter proxy-oppsett.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- Jellyseerr v2.7.3 修复了 API docs，并将 UserSettings username 字段设为 nullable。
- 更新了 Plex Watchlist URL，优雅处理无效 blacklist keywords，并在 MEDIA_AVAILABLE notifications 前刷新 media state。
- 还修复了 4K media delete 处理，并在 proxy setup 后初始化 image proxies。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- Jellyseerr v2.7.3 は API docs を修正し、UserSettings username フィールドを nullable にします。
- Plex Watchlist URL を更新し、無効な blacklist keywords を安全に処理し、MEDIA_AVAILABLE notifications の前に media state を更新します。
- 4K media delete 処理も修正し、proxy setup 後に image proxies を初期化します。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- Jellyseerr v2.7.3은 API docs를 수정하고 UserSettings username 필드를 nullable로 만듭니다.
- Plex Watchlist URL을 업데이트하고 잘못된 blacklist keywords를 안전하게 처리하며 MEDIA_AVAILABLE notifications 전에 media state를 새로 고칩니다.
- 또한 4K media delete 처리를 수정하고 proxy setup 이후 image proxies를 초기화합니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- Jellyseerr v2.7.3 corrige API docs et rend le champ UserSettings username nullable.
- L'URL Plex Watchlist est mise a jour, les blacklist keywords invalides sont gerees proprement et media state est rafraichi avant MEDIA_AVAILABLE notifications.
- La gestion 4K media delete est aussi corrigee et image proxies est initialise apres proxy setup.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- Jellyseerr v2.7.3 behebt API docs und macht das UserSettings username-Feld nullable.
- Die Plex Watchlist URL wurde aktualisiert, ungueltige blacklist keywords werden sauber behandelt, und media state wird vor MEDIA_AVAILABLE notifications aktualisiert.
- Ausserdem wurden 4K media delete-Verarbeitung korrigiert und image proxies nach proxy setup initialisiert.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- Jellyseerr v2.7.3 fixar API-dokument och gör fältet UserSettings användarnamn nullbart.
- Den uppdaterar Plex bevakningslista URL, hanterar ogiltiga sökord på svarta listan på ett elegant sätt och uppdaterar mediatillstånd före MEDIA_AVAILABLE-meddelanden.
- Den fixar också hanteringen av 4K mediaborttagning och initierar bildproxy efter proxyinstallation.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Το Jellyseerr v2.7.3 διορθώνει τα έγγραφα API και κάνει το πεδίο ονόματος χρήστη UserSettings μηδενικό.
- Ενημερώνει τη λίστα παρακολούθησης Plex URL, χειρίζεται με χάρη τις μη έγκυρες λέξεις-κλειδιά της μαύρης λίστας και ανανεώνει την κατάσταση πολυμέσων πριν από τις ειδοποιήσεις MEDIA_AVAILABLE.
- Διορθώνει επίσης το χειρισμό διαγραφής πολυμέσων 4K και προετοιμάζει τους διακομιστή μεσολάβησης εικόνας μετά τη ρύθμιση του διακομιστή μεσολάβησης.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- Jellyseerr v2.7.3 popravlja API dokumente i čini polje korisničkog imena UserSettings nullable.
- Ažurira Plex Watchlist URL, elegantno rukuje nevažećim ključnim riječima crne liste i osvježava stanje medija prije MEDIA_AVAILABLE obavijesti.
- Također popravlja rukovanje brisanjem medija 4K i inicijalizira proxy slike nakon postavljanja proxyja.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- Jellyseerr v2.7.3 corrige documentos de API e torna o campo de nome de utilizador UserSettings anulável.
- Atualiza o Plex Watchlist URL, lida com palavras-chave inválidas da lista negra normalmente e atualiza o estado dos media antes das notificações MEDIA_AVAILABLE.
- Também corrige o tratamento de eliminação de suportes 4K e inicializa os proxies de imagem após a configuração do proxy.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- Jellyseerr v2.7.3 исправляет документы API и делает поле имени пользователя UserSettings обнуляемым.
- Он обновляет список наблюдения Plex URL, корректно обрабатывает недопустимые ключевые слова из черного списка и обновляет состояние мультимедиа перед уведомлениями MEDIA_AVAILABLE.
- Он также исправляет обработку удаления носителя 4K и инициализирует прокси-серверы изображений после настройки прокси-сервера.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- Jellyseerr v2.7.3, API belgelerini düzeltir ve UserSettings kullanıcı adı alanını null yapılabilir hale getirir.
- Plex İzleme Listesi URL'ü günceller, geçersiz kara liste anahtar sözcüklerini hassas bir şekilde işler ve MEDIA_AVAILABLE bildirimlerinden önce medya durumunu yeniler.
- Ayrıca 4K ortam silme işlemini de düzeltir ve proxy kurulumundan sonra görüntü proxy'lerini başlatır.

title: Jellyseerr
